title: Wools Drop OP Items
description: Turn wool into an overpowered loot source for fast and exciting gameplay.
body:
The Wool is OP datapack turns simple wool blocks into powerful loot sources. Breaking wool now has a chance to drop overpowered items, rare resources, or enchanted gear, making sheep farming and building materials surprisingly valuable.

This datapack adds a fun and unexpected twist to survival gameplay while keeping vanilla mechanics familiar. It’s perfect for multiplayer servers, custom challenges, or players who want faster progression with a unique concept.

Features

Wool drops OP items and rare loot

Includes enchanted tools, weapons, and valuable resources

Makes farming sheep highly rewarding

Boosts early-game progression

Compatible with vanilla Minecraft

Works in singleplayer and multiplayer
